Container.Name: snorcal
Container.Overview:
Self-hosted 3D slicing hub for OrcaSlicer and BambuStudio. Web UI for uploading models, configuring slice settings, painting face colors, and shipping gcode to Moonraker/Bambu printers.
Runs on the host network so it can discover printers via mDNS/SSDP and reach companion containers via localhost. Requires one or both bambuddy slicer sidecars (companion containers exposing ports to the host): - ghcr.io/maziggy/orca-slicer-api:latest (host port 3003) - ghcr.io/maziggy/bambu-studio-api:latest (host port 3001)
Redis is OPTIONAL — only needed if you want the BullMQ-backed job queue (useful for multiple workers). Without it, slices run in-process.
No shared volume needed — snorcal uploads 3MF and downloads gcode over HTTP.
Container.Requires: At least one bambuddy slicer sidecar (ghcr.io/maziggy/orca-slicer-api or ghcr.io/maziggy/bambu-studio-api). Snorcal uses host networking — companions must expose their ports to the host (127.0.0.1) so Snorcal can reach them via localhost. Redis is optional.

Config.Name: PORT
Config.Description: Port the backend listens on. Pick a host port that's free (3000 is often taken on Unraid).

Config.Name: App Data
Config.Description: Persistent storage for the SQLite DB, uploaded models, and generated gcode.

Config.Name: REDIS_HOST
Config.Description: OPTIONAL. Redis hostname for BullMQ job queue. Leave blank to run slices in-process (recommended for single-user). Set to 127.0.0.1 (or Redis container bridge IP) to enable.

Config.Name: REDIS_PORT
Config.Description: OPTIONAL. Redis port. Only used when REDIS_HOST is set.

Config.Name: SLICER_URL_ORCASLICER
Config.Description: URL of the OrcaSlicer sidecar (bambuddy). With host networking, default is localhost:3003. Leave blank to disable OrcaSlicer engine.

Config.Name: SLICER_URL_BAMBUSTUDIO
Config.Description: URL of the BambuStudio sidecar (bambuddy). With host networking, default is localhost:3001. Leave blank to disable BambuStudio engine.

Config.Name: NODE_ENV
Config.Description: Set to production so backend serves the bundled frontend.

Config.Name: TZ
Config.Description: Timezone for timestamps in logs and job records.

Config.Name: DEBUG_PRINTER
Config.Description: Set to 1 to enable verbose MQTT/printer adapter logs.
